name: OCU P2 Vision Pipeline
description: Validates the vision pipeline: Analyze/Match/Diff/OCR via remote dispatch or local CPU fallback.

test_cases.name: pipeline-analyze-local-fallback
test_cases.expected_result: Pipeline.Analyze falls back to LocalBackend when Dispatcher returns an error; DispatchedTo is 'local-cpu'

test_cases.name: pipeline-match-local-fallback
test_cases.expected_result: Pipeline.Match falls back to LocalBackend; returns 1 match with Confidence 0.9

test_cases.name: pipeline-diff-local-fallback
test_cases.expected_result: Pipeline.Diff falls back to LocalBackend; returns non-nil DiffResult

test_cases.name: pipeline-ocr-local-fallback
test_cases.expected_result: Pipeline.OCR falls back to LocalBackend; returns OCRResult with FullText 'hi'

test_cases.name: pipeline-nil-local-errors
test_cases.expected_result: Pipeline.Analyze returns ErrNoBackend when dispatcher fails and local is nil

test_cases.name: pipeline-analyze-remote-dispatch
test_cases.expected_result: Pipeline.Analyze prefers remote Worker; DispatchedTo is 'thinker-cuda'

test_cases.name: pipeline-ocr-remote-dispatch
test_cases.expected_result: Pipeline.OCR uses remote TensorRT worker; FullText is empty (P2 stub)

test_cases.name: cpu-analyze-local-cpu

steps.name: Run CPU Backend Analyze returns local-cpu

test_cases.expected_result: Backend.Analyze returns Analysis with DispatchedTo='local-cpu' for BGRA8 frame

test_cases.name: cpu-analyze-rejects-unsupported

steps.name: Run CPU Backend Analyze rejects unsupported format

test_cases.expected_result: Backend.Analyze returns error for H264-format frames

test_cases.name: cpu-match-empty

steps.name: Run CPU Backend Match returns empty

test_cases.expected_result: Backend.Match returns empty slice (real template matching deferred to P2.5)

test_cases.name: cpu-diff-same-shape

steps.name: Run CPU Backend Diff flags same shape

test_cases.expected_result: Backend.Diff sets SameShape=true for two frames with identical dimensions

test_cases.name: cpu-ocr-empty

steps.name: Run CPU Backend OCR returns empty

test_cases.expected_result: Backend.OCR returns empty FullText (real Tesseract/TensorRT deferred to P2.5)

test_cases.name: pipeline-stress-100-concurrent
test_cases.expected_result: 100 concurrent goroutines all complete Analyze without errors or data races
